summary: Upgraded ios-extractor.py to v0.1.1. Added actor type support, static stored property detection (static_var/static_let kinds), backtick enum case handling, and nested type capture. AmityCommunityMembership.QueryFilter and .SearchFilter now appear in nested_types. .shared static members now captured.
notes: AmityEventRepository/AmityRoomRepository do NOT have .shared static properties in the SDK — those docs references are fabricated. However, other types (ScreenActor, StreamSessionBuilderFactory, etc.) DO have public static let shared, and those now validate. AmityCommunityMembership.QueryFilter and SearchFilter are real nested enums and now appear correctly.
